name: Hent-ai Service Adapter
description: Delegates OpenClaw media lifecycle hooks to the Hent-ai service.

hentAiService.description: Hent-ai service connection settings. The adapter is disabled when url or token is missing/invalid.

url.description: Base URL for the Hent-ai service. Non-localhost URLs must use HTTPS.

token.description: Bearer token for the Hent-ai service. Supports literal value or '${ENV_VAR}' placeholder.
